programme.title: Buried Secrets of the Bible With Albert Lin
programme.desc: Scientist Albert Lin hunts for evidence of the Parting of the Red Sea, one of the best-known stories in the Bible, using satellite technology to find out what may have happened when Moses purportedly parted the Red Sea for fleeing Israelites.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Buried Secrets of the Bible With Albert Lin
programme.desc: Scientist Albert Lin investigates whether the story of the destruction of Sodom and Gomorrah was inspired by real events; using technology, Albert seeks out answers to this biblical mystery amid ancient cities to reveal destructive forces of nature.

programme.title: Historic Silver Set

programme.desc: A crack addict faces the choice between going to rehab or continuing to live his life drugged.

programme.desc: A team of doctors tries to convince a young heroin addict to seek the help he needs.

programme.desc: Cocaine is hidden in coffee bags and shoes; a young woman goes missing.
